sqlMap.select: SELECT $v_pITEMNAME$ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND ROWNUM <= 1 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT $v_pITEMNAME$ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND ROWNUM <= 1 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE WHERE PORTALPAGEID = #v_pUID# AND ACCESSIDLIST = #v_pACCESSLISTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT RENDEREDHTML FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE WHERE PORTALPAGEID = #v_PORTALPAGEID# AND ACCESSIDLIST = #v_ACCESSIDLIST# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT PARENTUID FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT PARENTUID FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pTEMP# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND CN = #v_pCN# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT UID_ , PARENTUID , DISPLAYNAME , WIDTH , HEIGHT , ROWLENGTH , COLUMNLENGTH , ROWSPLIT , COLUMNSPLIT FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT B.* FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL A, EZPORTAL.TBL_USERINFO B WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ ) ) AND A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND A.UseFlag = 'Y' AND B.UserID = #v_pUSERID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT B.* FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL A, EZPORTAL.TBL_USERINFO B WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ ) ) AND A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND A.UseFlag = 'Y' AND B.UserID = #v_pUSERID# AND B.lang = #v_pLANG# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT B.* FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL B WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ ) ) AND A.UID_ = B.ParentUID AND A.UseFlag = #v_pUSERFLAG# AND B.CompanyID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND B.ParentUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND B.GubunFlag = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND B.CreatorID = #v_pUSERID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL ( UID_, PARENTUID, DEPTH, DISPLAYNAME, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATEDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, ROWLENGTH, COLUMNLENGTH, ROWSPLIT, COLUMNSPLIT, GUBUNFLAG, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) ( SELECT #v_pNEWPAGEID# , #v_pPARENTUID# , #v_pDEPTH# , #v_pUSERNAME# , #v_pUSERID# , #v_pUSERNAME# , SYSDATE , Width , Height , RowLength , ColumnLength , RowSplit , ColumnSplit , #v_pGUBUNFLAG# , #v_pCOMPANYID# , #tenantID# FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPARENTUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
INSERT INTO EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL ( UID_, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, VIEW_RIGHT, EDIT_RIGHT ) VALUES ( #v_pNEWPAGEID#, #v_pACCESSID#, #v_pACCESSNAME#, #v_pVIEW_RIGHT#, #v_pEDIT_RIGHT# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(B.UID_) FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL B WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ ) ) AND A.UID_ = B.ParentUID AND A.UseFlag = #v_pUSEFLAG# AND B.CompanyID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND B.CreatorID = #v_pCREATORID# AND B.GubunFlag = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT EDIT_RIGHT FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSIDLIST# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT VIEW_RIGHT FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSIDLIST# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT TYPE FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.* FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A , EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL B WHERE (NOT EXISTS (SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = A.UID_)) AND A.UseFlag = 'Y' AND A.GubunFlag = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND A.CompanyID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND (B.AccessID = #v_pACCESSIDLIST# AND $v_pSTRRIGHT$ ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT TOPURL FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT MAINURL FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_PUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT A.UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_LOGOS A, EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL B WHERE A.OwnerPageID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND A.UID_ = B.UID_ AND ( B.AccessID = #v_pACCESSID# AND B.View_Right = 2 ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND SKINNUM = #v_pSKINNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.ParamName ParamName , A.ParamValue ParamValue , A.ParamType ParamType , B.ParamInfo ParamInfo FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_PARAMETERS A JOIN EZPORTAL.TBL_BUILTIN_PARAMETERS B ON A.PARAMTYPE = B.PARAMTYPE WHERE A.UID_ = #v_pUID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT A.ParamName ParamName , A.ParamValue ParamValue , A.ParamType ParamType , B.ParamInfo ParamInfo FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTLET_PARAMETERS A JOIN EZPORTAL.TBL_BUILTIN_PARAMETERS B ON A.PARAMTYPE = B.PARAMTYPE WHERE A.UID_ = #v_pPortletID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY COLUMNPOS ASC

SELECT A.* , B.NORMALIMAGEPATH FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS A LEFT JOIN EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_IMAGE B ON A.IMAGEUID = B.UID_ AND B.SKINNUM = #v_pSKINNUM# WHERE A.PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND A.OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.COLUMNPOS ASC
SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS WHERE PARENTUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND OWNERPAGEID = #v_pOWNERPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY COLUMNPOS ASC
SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS_S WHERE PARENTMENUID = #v_pPARENTUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY COLUMNPOS ASC
SELECT TRIM($v_pPITEMNAME$) FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT TRIM($v_pPITEMNAME$) FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTLET_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTLETID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT PAGEUID FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_ITEMS WHERE UID_ = #v_pTEMP# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT UID_ , PARENTUID , DISPLAYNAME , WIDTH , HEIGHT , ROWLENGTH , COLUMNLENGTH , ROWSPLIT , COLUMNSPLIT FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pPORTALPAGEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE WHERE PORTALPAGEID = #v_PORTALPAGEID# AND ACCESSIDLIST = #v_ACCESSIDLIST# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_CACHE ( PORTALPAGEID, ACCESSIDLIST, RENDEREDHTML, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_PORTALPAGEID#, #v_ACCESSIDLIST#, #v_RENDEREDHTML#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT BASETYPE FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT UID_ , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , DISPLAYNAME3 , DISPLAYNAME4 , IMAGEURL , TOPURL , MAINURL , COMPANAYID , CREATORID , CREATORNM , CREATEDATE , MODIFYDATE FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE COMPANAYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CREATEDATE
SELECT * FROM TBL_PortalPage_Category
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL SET USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG# WHERE UID_ = #v_pUID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #v_pUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CREATORID , URL FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTLET_URL WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND CREATORID = #v_CREATORID# AND USERTYPE = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT CREATORID , BOARDID , ITEMCOUNT , ITEMFIELDS FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTLET_BOARD WHERE UID_ = #v_UID# AND CREATORID = #v_CREATORID# AND USERTYPE = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT DISTINCT A.UID_ , A.DisplayName FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL companyACL WHERE A.USEFLAG = 'Y' AND A.COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND A.GubunFlag = REPLACE(#v_pGUBUNFLAG#, 'c', ' ') AND A.UID_ = companyACL.UID_ AND ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pIDUSER# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) OR ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pIDDEPT# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) AND A.UID_ NOT IN ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE ACCESSID = #v_pIDUSER# AND VIEW_RIGHT = '1' ) ) OR ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pIDCOMPANY# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) AND A.UID_ NOT IN ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE accessid IN ( #v_pIDUSER#,#v_pIDDEPT# ) AND View_Right = '1' ) ) ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.UID_ ASC
SELECT UID_ , ParentUID , GubunFlag , UseFlag FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE DISPLAYNAME = #v_pDISPLAYNAME# AND GUBUNFLAG = #v_pGUBUNFLAG# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY UID_ ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.UID_) FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL A, EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL companyACL WHERE A.UseFlag = 'Y' AND A.CompanyID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND A.GubunFlag = REPLACE(#v_pGUBUNFLAG#, 'c', ' ') AND A.UID_ = companyACL.UID_ AND ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pIDUSER# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) OR ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pIDDEPT# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) AND A.UID_ NOT IN ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE ACCESSID = #v_pIDUSER# AND View_Right = '1' ) ) OR ( ( companyACL.AccessID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND companyACL.View_Right = '2' ) AND A.UID_ NOT IN ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL WHERE ACCESSID IN ( #v_pIDUSER#,#v_pIDDEPT# ) AND View_Right = '1' ) ) ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT a.UID_ UID_ , a.ImageUID ImageUID , a.OwnerPageID ParentUID , a.DisplayName DisplayName , a.LinkURL LinkURL FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS a, ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG# AND lang = #v_pLANG# AND ThemeUID = #v_pUSERTHEMEUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) b WHERE a.ParentUID = '203' AND a.OwnerPageID = b.uid_ AND ( a.DisplayName = '홈' OR a.DisplayName = 'home' OR a.LinkURL = '/ezPortal/myPortal.do' ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT a.UID_ UID_ , a.ImageUID ImageUID , a.OwnerPageID ParentUID , a.DisplayName DisplayName , a.LinkURL LinkURL FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS a, ( SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND USEFLAG = #v_pUSEFLAG# AND THEMEUID = #v_pUSERTHEMEUID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) b WHERE a.ParentUID = '203' AND a.OwnerPageID = b.uid_ AND a.DisplayName = '홈' AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT DISTINCT AA.UID_ , AA.IMAGEUID , AA.OWNERPAGEID , AA.DISPLAYNAME , AA.LINKURL , AA.COLUMNPOS , AA.VIEW_RIGHT , AA.ACCESSID , AA.ORDERNUM FROM ( SELECT A.UID_ , A.ImageUID , A.OwnerPageID , A.DisplayName , A.LinkURL , A.ColumnPos , B.AccessID , B.View_Right , INSTR(',' || #v_DEPTPATH# || ',', ',' || B.AccessID || ',') ORDERNUM , CASE WHEN B.AccessID = 'everyone' THEN '1' WHEN INSTR(',' || #v_DEPTPATH# || ',', ',' || B.AccessID || ',') > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END FLAG FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_MENUITEM_ITEMS_MENUITEMS A LEFT JOIN EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTAL_ACL B ON A.UID_ = B.UID_ WHERE A.ParentUID = '203' AND A.OwnerPageID = #v_PUSETOPMENUID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AA WHERE AA.FLAG = '1' ORDER BY AA.COLUMNPOS, AA.ORDERNUM
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_USERSTARTPAGE_ITEM WHERE UID_ = #v_pOLDUID# AND ACCESSID = #v_pUSERID# AND COMPANYID = #v_pCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ParentUID FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_TOPMENU_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #parentTopMenuID#
SELECT ParentUID FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTALPAGE_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #temp#
SELECT * FROM ($strSQL$) A ORDER BY A.RowPos
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM ($strSQL$) A ORDER BY A.RowPos

SELECT DISTINCT * FROM ($strSQL$) A WHERE A.UID_ NOT IN (SELECT UID_ FROM ezPortal.TBL_PortalPage_Items_Change WHERE UID_ = A.UID_ AND PageUID = A.PageUID AND OwnerPageUID = A.OwnerPageUID AND CreatorID = '$pUserID$' AND OwnerPageUID = '$pTopParentPageID$' AND ChangeFlag = '2' ) ORDER BY A.RowPos
SELECT TOPURL FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #pUID#
SELECT MAINURL FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_THEME_GENERAL WHERE UID_ = #pUID#
SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTLET_URL WHERE UID_ = #pUID#
SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTLET_HTMLPAGE WHERE UID_ = #pUID#
SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTLET_IMAGE WHERE UID_ = #pUID#
SELECT * FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PORTLET_BOARD WHERE UID_ = #pUID#
SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_Portal_ACL WHERE UID_ = #pResult# AND ACCESSID = #pAccessID#
SELECT UID_ FROM EZPORTAL.TBL_PortalPage_General WHERE DISPLAYNAME = #pDisplayName# AND COMPANYID = #pCompanyID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #pGubunFlag#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZPORTAL.TBL_Portal_ACL WHERE UID_ = #pResult# AND ACCESSID = #pAccessID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZPORTAL.TBL_Portal_ACL SET VIEW_RIGHT = '2' , EDIT_RIGHT = '2' WHERE UID_ = #pResult# AND ACCESSID = #pAccessID#
UPDATE EZPORTAL.TBL_PortalPage_General SET UseFlag = #useFlag# WHERE UID_ = #pUID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #pUserID# AND COMPANYID = #pCompanyID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #pGubunFlag#
UPDATE EZPORTAL.TBL_PortalPage_General SET UseFlag = #useFlag# WHERE UID_ != #pUID# AND DISPLAYNAME = #pUserID# AND COMPANYID = #pCompanyID# AND GUBUNFLAG = #pGubunFlag#
